song.title: Like a River Glorious
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Like a river glorious Is God’s perfect peace, Over all victorious In its bright increase;|| Perfect, yet it floweth Fuller every day, Perfect, yet it groweth Deeper all the way.
[C] Chorus Stayed upon Christ Jesus, Hearts are fully blest; Finding, as He promised, Perfect peace and rest.
[V2] 2) Hidden in the hollow Of His blessed hand, Never foe can follow, Never traitor stand;|| Not a surge of worry, Not a shade of care, Not a blast of hurry Touch the spirit there.
[V3] 3) Every joy or trial Falleth from above, Traced upon our dial By the Sun of Love.|| We may trust Him fully All for us to do; They who trust Him wholly Find Him wholly true.
song.author: Frances R. Havergal
